gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Comment) WHERE c.score > 1 RETURN c.body_markdown
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Comment) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.body_markdown WHERE n.score > 1

gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {display_name: "Nikhil Kulkarni"})-[:PROVIDED]->(a:Answer)-[:ANSWERED]->(q:Question) WITH avg(q.view_count) AS average_view_count RETURN average_view_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)<-[r0:ASKED]-(m0:User {display_name: 'Nikhil Kulkarni'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.view_count)

gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Answer) RETURN a.link ORDER BY a.score LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Answer) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.link ORDER BY n.score ASC LIMIT 1

gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tag)<-[:TAGGED]-(q:Question) WHERE exists{(q)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(:Comment)} RETURN t.name, count(q) AS frequency ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tag)<-[r0:TAGGED]-(m0:Question)-[r1:COMMENTED_ON]->(m1:Comment) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.score DESC LIMIT 5

gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) RETURN u.display_name, count(q) AS questions_asked ORDER BY questions_asked DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:ASKED]-(m0:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.display_name ORDER BY n.score DESC LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question)<-[:ASKED]-(u:User) RETURN q.title AS question_title, q.view_count AS views, u.display_name AS user ORDER BY q.view_count DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.view_count DESC LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question)-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer) WITH q, a ORDER BY q.view_count DESC LIMIT 3 WITH a ORDER BY a.score ASC LIMIT 3 RETURN a.link AS answer_link, a.score AS answer_score, a.body_markdown AS answer_body
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Answer)<-[r0:ANSWERED]-(m0:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.score ORDER BY n.score ASC LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Answer {uuid: 69273049}) RETURN a.body_markdown
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Answer {uuid: 69273049}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.body_markdown

gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question {title: 'Neo.ClientError.Statement.ExternalResourceFailed error on loading CSV file from local'}) RETURN u.display_name AS asked_by
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:ASKED]-(m0:Question {title: 'Neo.ClientError.Statement.ExternalResourceFailed error on loading CSV file from local'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WITH t, COUNT(q) AS question_count ORDER BY question_count DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN t.name AS tag_name, question_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tag)<-[r0:TAGGED]-(m0:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name ASC LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tag {name: "neo4j"})<-[:TAGGED]-(q:Question) WHERE q.view_count > 100 WITH distinct q MATCH (q)<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer)<-[:PROVIDED]-(u:User) WITH distinct u MATCH (u)-[:COMMENTED]->(c:Comment)-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(q2:Question) WITH collect(c.score) AS comment_scores RETURN max(comment_scores) AS max_comment_score
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Comment)<-[r0:COMMENTED_ON]-(m0:Question)<-[r1:TAGGED]-(m1:Tag {name: 'neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.score > 0 AND n.view_count > 100 RETURN max(n.score)

gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question)<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer) WHERE exists((u)-[:PROVIDED]->(a)) RETURN DISTINCT u.display_name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:PROVIDED]-(m0:Answer)-[r1:ANSWERED]->(m1:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(c:Comment) WHERE c.score = 3 RETURN q LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)<-[r0:COMMENTED_ON]-(m0:Comment)-[r1:COMMENTED_ON]->(m1:Question {name: 'first 3 questions'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.score = 3 RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name ASC LIMIT 3
